headline: Data Preprocessing
description: Data preprocessing cleans and prepares raw data for ML. Steps: handling missing values (drop, impute), outlier detection and treatment, encoding categorical variables, feature scaling, train/test splitting. Real-world data is messy — preprocessing typically consumes 60-80% of a data scientist's time.
